prompt: A photorealistic overhead flat-lay photograph of premium A4 letterhead stationery on a dark architect's desk. The letterhead is printed on thick cream-white textured cotton paper. At the top-centre of the page is a minimalist technical logo: the letters 'LK' in thin monospace font centered inside a thin gold circle with small crosshair lines extending at 12, 3, 6, and 9 o'clock positions, small corner registration marks, and a dashed outer ring, with 'DESIGN AND BUILD' in ultra-thin spaced monospace capitals below the circle. Thin gold (#C9A96E) horizontal rules as header and footer lines. The body area has placeholder monospace text in light grey suggesting a technical drawing specification style. Props around the letterhead: a brass drafting compass, a precision mechanical pencil, and the edge of a dark leather desk pad. Shot overhead with 50mm f/4 lens, even soft lighting, slight shadow depth. Rich cinematic colour grading, deep blacks, warm gold highlights. Premium architectural stationery design.
negative_prompt: cheap, cartoon, blurry, distorted text, misspelled, bright colours, cluttered, plastic, glossy, wrinkled paper
